title: Tas Mudik Jumbo 50cm Murah Banget!

segments.visual: Close-up host surprised face with hand gesture
segments.narration: Stop scroll! Kenapa harus bayar mahal buat tas mudik kalau ini ada guys, no cap.

segments.visual: Product spinning on table with bright lighting
segments.narration: Temuin ini, tas pakaian jumbo 50cm yang literally next level kualitasnya buat travel atau mudik.

segments.visual: Big text overlay of price on screen
segments.narration: Harganya cuma tujuh puluh ribuan, which is worth it banget for this size.

segments.visual: Host stuffing clothes inside bag to show capacity
segments.narration: Kapasitasnya Guedeeeee loh, literally muatin semua baju kamu tanpa perlu ribet lipet. --- Jahitan rapih, packing aman, bener banget real pict and fast delivery, which is super important.

segments.visual: Host holding passport and ticket while holding the bag
segments.narration: Kalau aktivitas kamu sering jalan-jalan atau pulang kampung bareng bestie, ini solusinya banget.

segments.visual: Screenshot of rating and sold counter on screen
segments.narration: Tiga puluh ribu produk udah terjual, rating 4.9. --- Yang udah beli bilang, sumpah tasnya lucu banget dan cepet. --- Ada yang bilang ukuran nggak sesuai pesanan, jadi cek lagi ukurannya ya.

segments.visual: Host pointing to bottom of screen with smile
segments.narration: Penasaran sama detail lengkapnya? Cek di finding dot id ya, review produk-nya ada di sana bestie, jangan sampai kehabisan!

cta: Penasaran sama detail lengkapnya? Cek di finding dot id ya, review produk-nya ada di sana bestie!
